title: Achievement

articleLines.text: For achievements in beta versions, see Cookie Clicker Beta.
All achievements as of 2.052, not including Dungeon achievements.

Achievements are badges you earn for achieving certain goals, and each one increases the amount of milk you have (except shadow achievements). They were introduced in version 1.026. As of version 2.052, there are 622 normal achievements and 17 shadow achievements, totaling 639 achievements. Additionally, there are four dungeon achievements related to, of course, dungeons.

The number shown on the stats page represents the normal achievements, which are counted by default. Shadow achievements are uncounted until they are earned, and are then shown as (+1) (if one shadow achievement is earned, for example) next to the number of normal achievements in purple text.

Cookies baked per second

CpS boosted by Golden/Wrath Cookie effects, the Shimmering Veil, the Golden Switch boost, loans from the Stock Market, or Sugar Frenzy is not applicable for these achievements. CpS drain by Wrinkler withering does not affect the ability to earn these achievements. These achievements are based on "Raw cookies per second" which is now shown on the Stats page directly below "Cookies per second." Unlike other CpS boosts, Krumblor's auras, the Garden and the Pantheon directly affect raw CpS (the "dragon's fortune" aura doesn't count toward raw Cps).

↑ You can get the "Cookie-dunker" achievement by re-sizing the browser window vertically when you have earned at least 3 achievements (12% milk). Display of Milk does not need to be enabled in the Options.

2.0 2.1 2.2 2.3 These 4 achievements aren't available on the Nintendo Switch copy of Cookie Clicker, as a result, the Milestones Unlocked in that version is out of 618 and there are 4 less milestones boxes in the stats menu.
↑ The tiny cookie is one of the cookie icons () in the "General" section on the Stats page.
↑ You can get the "Stifling the press" achievement by re-sizing the browser window horizontally until it only displays "News: help!", then clicking on it.
↑ The hidden madeleine can be found at the very bottom of the "Info" menu.
Jump up to:
6.0 6.1 6.2 6.3 6.4 6.5 These achievements can only be obtained before ascending for the first time (or after ascending without gaining anything) or in Challenge Mode.

Jump up to:
8.0 8.1 8.2 8.3 Unlike most "number of actions" achievements, the Wrinkler and Reindeer achievements are counted in a single game, not all time: Ascending will reset the counter.
Jump up to:
9.0 9.1 9.2 Despite the description, the achievement is awarded only when all the cookies are bought, rather than unlocked.
Jump up to:
10.0 10.1 10.2 10.3 You need to gain at least +1 prestige level to make an ascension count towards achievements.

Jump up to:

13.0 13.1 The "cheated cookies taste awful" and "third-party" achievements are not implemented as Steam client achievements. However, "third-party" can be unlocked as an internal achievement through the use of Steam Workshop mods.

↑ You will incur -1% CpS penalty when you name your bakery Orteil. This penalty can be removed by renaming your bakery to something else. Misspelling the name as "Ortiel" will incur a -2% CpS penalty, and some of the cookies raining behind the Big Cookie will instead be replaced with the achievement icon. Every click made on the Big Cookie will also be the achievement icon.

↑ This refers to 1 trillion cookies in bank, not 1 trillion cookies baked this ascension. According to the source code, "this achievement is shadow because it is only achievable through blind luck or reading external guides; this may change in the future".

↑ This achievement can be obtained by setting your clone to have Hair 10, Hair color 2 or 7, any Skin color, Head shape 3 or 4, and either Extra-A/B being 3 or 4, with the other being 1. (Example import code: 10,2,2,3,7,3,1)
Note that if imported, the game does not perform the likeness check to see if the details match the achievement specifications, thus one aspect has to be changed manually in the editor itself.
↑ 11 days, 13 hours, 46 minutes and 40 seconds (=1 000 000 seconds) is the average time it takes to get this achievement.

↑ This is likely to be the only "playtime-based" achievement to be added. Getting this achievement doesn't require you to play for 8760 hours, thankfully, but rather only requires that you started your game at least one year ago. https://orteil42.tumblr.com/post/626404470693216256/any-plans-for-achievements-based-on-time-played
↑ Used to be a normal achievement, changed to shadow in update 2.031, and replaced with an achievement requiring only $10 million profit.

Trivia

↑ You can get the "Cookie-dunker" achievement by re-sizing the browser window vertically when you have earned at least 3 achievements (12% milk). Display of Milk does not need to be enabled in the Options.
Jump up to:

2.0 2.1 2.2 2.3 These 4 achievements aren't available on the Nintendo Switch copy of Cookie Clicker, as a result, the Milestones Unlocked in that version is out of 618 and there are 4 less milestones boxes in the stats menu.
↑ The tiny cookie is one of the cookie icons () in the "General" section on the Stats page.
↑ You can get the "Stifling the press" achievement by re-sizing the browser window horizontally until it only displays "News: help!", then clicking on it.
↑ The hidden madeleine can be found at the very bottom of the "Info" menu.
Jump up to:
6.0 6.1 6.2 6.3 6.4 6.5 These achievements can only be obtained before ascending for the first time (or after ascending without gaining anything) or in Challenge Mode.
↑ Wrath cookies summoned through the Force The Hand of Fate spell do not count for this achievement.
Jump up to:
8.0 8.1 8.2 8.3 Unlike most "number of actions" achievements, the Wrinkler and Reindeer achievements are counted in a single game, not all time: Ascending will reset the counter.
Jump up to:
9.0 9.1 9.2 Despite the description, the achievement is awarded only when all the cookies are bought, rather than unlocked.
Jump up to:
10.0 10.1 10.2 10.3 You need to gain at least +1 prestige level to make an ascension count towards achievements.
↑ Used to be one year of profit, which has now become a shadow achievement. Changed between 4 months and 3 months of profit in beta, now changed to $10 million.
↑ This achievement by renaming your bakery to <prefix>saysopensesame. The prefix can be anything, for instance "I"; Isaysopensesame.
Jump up to:

13.0 13.1 The "cheated cookies taste awful" and "third-party" achievements are not implemented as Steam client achievements. However, "third-party" can be unlocked as an internal achievement through the use of Steam Workshop mods.

↑ You will incur -1% CpS penalty when you name your bakery Orteil. This penalty can be removed by renaming your bakery to something else. Misspelling the name as "Ortiel" will incur a -2% CpS penalty, and some of the cookies raining behind the Big Cookie will instead be replaced with the achievement icon. Every click made on the Big Cookie will also be the achievement icon.

↑ This refers to 1 trillion cookies in bank, not 1 trillion cookies baked this ascension. According to the source code, "this achievement is shadow because it is only achievable through blind luck or reading external guides; this may change in the future".

↑ This achievement can be obtained by setting your clone to have Hair 10, Hair color 2 or 7, any Skin color, Head shape 3 or 4, and either Extra-A/B being 3 or 4, with the other being 1. (Example import code: 10,2,2,3,7,3,1)
Note that if imported, the game does not perform the likeness check to see if the details match the achievement specifications, thus one aspect has to be changed manually in the editor itself.
↑ 11 days, 13 hours, 46 minutes and 40 seconds (=1 000 000 seconds) is the average time it takes to get this achievement.

↑ This is likely to be the only "playtime-based" achievement to be added. Getting this achievement doesn't require you to play for 8760 hours, thankfully, but rather only requires that you started your game at least one year ago. https://orteil42.tumblr.com/post/626404470693216256/any-plans-for-achievements-based-on-time-played
↑ Used to be a normal achievement, changed to shadow in update 2.031, and replaced with an achievement requiring only $10 million profit.
